strategy: Attack with Fire; it is a boost school and it is the key to shutting off his revive.
He keeps a Trap cheat active, jinxing himself each round with Myth Trap, Hex, Mythic Fuel and the like. If you kill him while that cheat is on, he revives at full health.
To disable it, cast a Fire damage spell that removes harmful wards from him. That clears the jinxes off your team and turns off the Trap cheat. Do this before your kill shot.
After the trap cheat is off, finish him. Otherwise he revives, buffs whoever killed him with Mythic Fuel, and hands out Immolate cards.
Stack blades, disable the cheat with a ward-clearing Fire hit, then land the finisher.
cheatNotes: Each round he jinxes himself with one of the listed spells as part of his Trap cheat; this is the cheat that must be turned off before he can die for good.
A Fire damage spell that strips harmful wards off him clears the jinxes from your team and deactivates the Trap cheat. That is your setup step before killing him.
Kill him while the Trap cheat is still active and he revives at full health; disable it first.
When he revives he puts Mythic Fuel (+25%) on whoever killed him and hands wizards an Immolate card.
